setup_cmd: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential
build_cmd: CFLAGS=-g make -C tests/makefiles test_file && cc -Wl,-Map=tests/makefiles/test_file.map -o tests/makefiles/test_file $(find src demos examples tests/makefiles -name '*.o')

setup_cmd: ln -s components/lvgl/.git .git && . /opt/esp/idf/export.sh && echo "$IDF_PYTHON_ENV_PATH/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH && cp -r $IDF_PATH/examples/get-started/hello_world/* . && idf.py set-target esp32s3
